description: Every QuickBooks Online Accounting entity, plus an offline SQLite mirror and AR/AP aging.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint not provided and registryType='mcpb' not in the inference table)

name: io.github.Servosity/quickbooks-mcp

environmentVariables.description: OAuth 2.0 bearer access token (scope com.intuit.quickbooks.accounting). Mint it from the Intuit OAuth 2.0 Playground or `quickbooks-cli auth refresh`.
environmentVariables.name: QUICKBOOKS_ACCESS_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Your QuickBooks Online company (realm) ID; scopes every request to one company. Required unless you set the full QUICKBOOKS_BASE_URL.
environmentVariables.name: QUICKBOOKS_REALM_ID

environmentVariables.description: Intuit host to target: production (default) or sandbox. Combined with QUICKBOOKS_REALM_ID to build the base URL.
environmentVariables.name: QUICKBOOKS_ENVIRONMENT

title: QuickBooks Online MCP
